steps.title: Interpret the units and set up the conversion
steps.content:
The rate is 1,650 meters per hour per second, meaning 1,650 m/(h·s). To convert to ft/s², we need:
  • 1 meter = 3.28 feet
  • 1 hour = 3,600 seconds

steps.title: Apply conversions and calculate
steps.content:
Multiply by the conversion factors:
$$1,650 \times \frac{3.28}{3,600} = \frac{5,412}{3,600} \approx 1.503 \text{ ft/s}^2$$
This is closest to 1.50. That matches choice B — B is correct.
